overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a white coat exploring a dimly lit industrial facility or laboratory. The character walks through metal-floored workshops past NPC workers and machinery, approaching an exit doorway.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the industrial facility past storage lockers and shelving

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an industrial locker room area with metal storage cabinets on the right and shelving on the left. A worker sits at a folding table on the right side, facing away from the camera. The environment features dim artificial lighting and metal flooring.

scene_state.functional_zone: main workshop floor with yellow safety path

events.description: steps onto the yellow painted floor section marking the main workshop area

agents.ego_description: walking across the yellow safety path in the center of the workshop

notable_agents.action: worker in dark clothing walking from right to left across the yellow path

entered.detail: large industrial cylindrical tank with orange horizontal stripe
cluttered workbench with various tools and red equipment
old-style computer monitor and equipment on a desk

segments.scene_description: The character enters the main workshop area marked by a yellow safety path on the floor. A large cylindrical industrial tank dominates the left side while workbenches line the right. The character passes a computer terminal on the left and approaches a worker walking across the path.

events.description: passes the standing worker and continues toward the exit doorway
approaches the open doorway leading to a corridor with warning striped floor

agents.ego_description: approaching the exit doorway at the end of the workshop

entered.detail: open metal doorway with frame leading to a lit corridor
red and blue gas canisters stacked near the right wall
lit corridor visible through the open doorway with warning stripes on floor

segments.scene_description: The character passes the standing worker and approaches an exit doorway at the end of the workshop. Gas canisters are visible on the right near the door. Through the open doorway, a corridor with warning-striped flooring is visible, indicating a transition to a new area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit industrial facility that transitions from a narrow locker room into a spacious workshop and finally toward an exit corridor. It begins by following the character past metal storage cabinets and shelving in a locker room where a worker sits at a folding table. As the camera moves forward, the space opens into a main workshop area defined by a yellow safety path, passing a large cylindrical industrial tank on the left and workbenches on the right. The scene then shifts as the character moves past a computer terminal and a walking worker, drawing closer to the end of the room. Finally, the camera approaches an exit doorway flanked by gas canisters, revealing a corridor with warning-striped flooring just beyond the threshold.
